# Using Disasters to Estimate the Impact of Uncertainty

Python replication of Baker, Bloom, and Terry (2024), *Review of Economic Studies* 91, 720вЂ“747.

## Overview

This project provides a complete Python reproduction of the original codebase (Stata + MATLAB + Fortran), replicating all tables and figures from the paper bit-for-bit.

### Modules

| Module | Original | Python | Output |
|--------|----------|--------|--------|
| **IV** | Stata | `src/iv/` | Tables 1вЂ“6 |
| **IV_VAR** | MATLAB | `src/iv_var/` | Figures 6вЂ“7 |
| **LMN_VAR** | Stata + MATLAB | `src/lmn_var/` | Figures 3вЂ“5 |
| **MODEL** | Fortran 90 | `src/model/` | Figure 8 |

## Setup

```bash
# Create virtual environment
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate

# Install dependencies
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## Usage

### IV Panel Regressions (Tables 1вЂ“6)
```bash
python -m src.iv.panel_iv
```

### IV-VAR Estimation (Figures 6вЂ“7)
```bash
python -m src.iv_var.run_estimation
```

### LMN VAR (Figures 3вЂ“5)
```bash
python -m src.lmn_var.run_estimation
```

### Model Simulation (Figure 8)
```bash
python -m src.model.run_simulation
```

## Reference

Baker, S. R., Bloom, N., & Terry, S. J. (2024). Using Disasters to Estimate the Impact of Uncertainty. *The Review of Economic Studies*, 91(2), 720вЂ“747. https://doi.org/10.1093/restud/rdad036
